meta.name: Forward Test — Professional Trade History & Analytics
meta.description: Upgrades the /live forward test dashboard's trade history from a basic 7-column table to institutional-grade: sortable 11-column trade log, coin filtering, trade stats strip, exit reason donut chart, paginated API, and full i18n support in 10 languages.

user_actions: Run the SQL migration in Supabase Dashboard → SQL Editor (file: supabase/migrations/20260411000000_add_trade_analytics_columns.sql)

steps.title: DB migration: add analytics columns
steps.content_description: ALTER TABLE live_trades ADD COLUMN r_multiple numeric; ALTER TABLE live_trades ADD COLUMN bars_held int;
steps.notes: User must manually run this in Supabase SQL Editor. Existing rows get NULL — UI handles gracefully.

steps.title: Cron worker: persist r_multiple + bars_held
steps.change: In the tradesToInsert.push({...}) block, add two fields: r_multiple: t.rMultiple, bars_held: t.barsHeld. These are already computed by closeFull() in backtester.ts — just persist them.
steps.location_hint: Search for 'tradesToInsert.push' — add after 'commission: t.totalCommission' line

steps.title: API: paginated trade endpoint with stats

query_params.symbol: optional, e.g. BTCUSDT — filters by coin
query_params.sort: optional, default 'exit_ts', allowed: exit_ts, pnl, r_multiple, bars_held, entry_price, exit_price

response_shape.trades: array of trade rows from live_trades table
response_shape.total: integer — total count of trades matching the filter (for pagination)

stats.exitReasons: object mapping exit_reason string to count

spec.stats_scope: Stats are computed from ALL trades matching the symbol filter (not just the current page). Use Supabase aggregate queries or fetch all and compute server-side.
spec.supabase_client: Use createClient from @supabase/supabase-js with anon key (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY). Public read via RLS.

props.initialSymbol: string | null — pre-selected coin filter, null = all

features: 11 sortable columns: Coin, Side, Entry Date, Entry $, Exit Date, Exit $, PnL $, PnL %, R, Bars, Exit Reason
Coin filter tabs at top: All | BTC | ETH | SOL | XRP | BNB — clicking refetches from API
Pagination: 50 per page, prev/next buttons with 'Showing 1–50 of 127' text
Click any column header to sort (ascending/descending toggle) — refetches from API
Color coding: green (text-emerald-400) for wins (pnl > 0), red (text-red-400) for losses
Direction badge: LONG = bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400, SHORT = bg-red-500/15 text-red-400
R-multiple and bars_held handle null (show '—' for legacy trades)
Empty state: 'No trades yet — forward test is accumulating data.' message
spec.data_fetching: useEffect that fetches /api/live/trades?symbol=X&limit=50&offset=page*50&sort=sortKey&dir=sortDir. Refetches when any of these change.

reuse.sortable_header_pattern: Replicate the Th component from src/components/TradeTable.tsx — a <th> that shows sort arrow icons and toggles on click
reuse.format_utils: Import fmtUsd, fmtPct, fmtNum, fmtDate from src/lib/utils/format.ts

spec.styling: Match the existing forward test page dark theme. Use var(--color-border), var(--color-surface), var(--color-muted), var(--color-bg) CSS variables. Rounded-xl border. Font-mono tabular-nums for numbers.

props.stats: { winCount, lossCount, winRate, avgWin, avgLoss, profitFactor, expectancy, totalPnl } | null

spec.layout: Horizontal grid of 6 mini KPI cards (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-6). Each card: label (10px uppercase muted) + value (lg font-mono bold). Same card style as the existing MiniKpi in page.tsx.
spec.null_handling: If stats is null, show skeleton placeholders (animate-pulse)

spec.implementation: Direct port of src/components/charts/ExitReasons.tsx pattern. Same Recharts PieChart (innerRadius=55, outerRadius=95, paddingAngle=2), same COLORS map, same legend grid below the chart. Only differences: (a) props are flat objects not Metrics type, (b) receives title from parent.
spec.null_handling: If exitReasons is null or empty, show 'No data' centered text

steps.title: Update /live page: replace inline table
changes: Remove the entire inline <table> block (the 'Recent trades' section with thead/tbody)
Remove recentTrades from the main /api/live fetch (or keep for backward compat)

Add a new section after 'Cron health' div with this layout: LiveTradeStats strip on top, then a 2-column grid: LiveTradeTable (wide) + LiveExitReasons (300px sidebar). LiveTradeTable manages its own data fetching internally.
Pass dict.live.tradeAnalytics as i18n props to each component
steps.remove_from_old_trades_section: The entire {data.recentTrades.length > 0 && (...)} block with the inline table

steps.title: i18n: add tradeAnalytics keys to all 10 dictionaries
steps.change: Add a 'tradeAnalytics' object inside the existing 'live' object, after the 'updated' key. English keys listed in the plan. For other languages, translate the user-facing strings (labels, messages) but keep technical terms (PnL, R, Bars) in English per the project's translation policy (see en.ts line 4-6).

table.noTrades: No trades yet — forward test is accumulating data.

manual_checks: Open /live locally — trade analytics section renders (empty state OK)
After deploy + cron tick with trade close: r_multiple and bars_held visible in table
Coin filter tabs work (API refetch on click)
Exit reasons donut chart renders with correct colors
i18n: switch language, all labels translate

constraints: No new npm dependencies — recharts and lucide-react already installed
Reuse existing format utils (fmtUsd, fmtPct, fmtNum, fmtDate) — do not duplicate
Follow existing dark theme: var(--color-border), var(--color-surface), var(--color-muted), var(--color-bg)
All user-facing strings must use i18n dictionary (useDictionary hook) — no hardcoded English in components
Technical terms (PnL, R, ATR, Sharpe, Stop Loss, TP1/TP2/TP3) stay in English across all languages
Stats computed server-side in the API route, not client-side
Production-only cron guard stays intact — do not modify
Supabase reads use anon key (public RLS), writes use service_role
